evals.prompt: i just want claude code to stop bugging me about git permissions every time. how do i set that up so it just does it automatically
evals.expected_output: Should provide the exact settings.json configuration for auto-approving git commands, explain where to put the file, and mention both the quick setup and the safety-first option

evals.prompt: ok i made a bunch of changes to the login page and the api routes. commit everything and push it up and make a PR
evals.expected_output: Should run git status/diff, stage specific files, write a conventional commit message, push with upstream tracking, create a PR with gh cli, and LOG the entire session to .claude/git-auto-log.json

evals.prompt: review my git activity and tell me how i can improve my workflow
evals.expected_output: Should read .claude/git-auto-log.json, analyze patterns, score the workflow on 5 dimensions, generate a review report to .claude/git-auto-review.md, and produce specific improvement suggestions for both the user workflow and the skill itself
